name: @visuelconcept/wui-para
title: Parametrization (PARA)
description: PARA datapoint-parametrization page (/para): two tabs — a nested DP-type model editor (create/change/delete types in place) and an instances/values browser (live values + config attributes). Embeds a proposal-only AI assistant (via the /api/ai bridge) and DPL ASCII import/export (multi-select DP/DPT) through the dplAscii MSA manager (WCCOAasciiSQLite). Engineering ops via the /api/para API.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-camera-streams
title: Camera Streams (RTSP)
description: View RTSP IP cameras in-browser (JSMpeg) over a same-origin ws relay to the rtspProxy manager (ffmpeg pulls each stream once and fans MPEG1-TS out to N clients).

name: @visuelconcept/wui-audit-trail
title: Audit Trail
description: Audit Trail page — pivot table of a datapoint's NGA-archived element history, with a config popup (DP/period/columns/refresh) persisted to an AuditTrail_Config DP.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-mosaic
title: Mosaic
description: Mosaic page — free drag/resize display wall embedding other dashboard views as chromeless same-origin iframes; 1 DP per board (Mosaic_Board) + an overview list.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-ampere
title: Ampère (electrical)
description: Ampère pages (/ampere + /ampere/:networkid) — draw single-line (mono-filaire) electrical distribution networks (TGBT/switchboards, disconnectors, breakers, busbars, transformers…) incl. railway electrification (catenary, track return, rectifier, sectioning switch, autotransformer, train) with an in-place edit mode, an IEC 60617 symbol toolbox, free per-device DP binding, live wire energisation by graph traversal through closed switchgear, free/attached live measurement labels, and a proposal-only AI assistant that generates network models. Stored as Ampere_Network DPs.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-report-builder
title: Report Builder
description: Report Builder pages (/report-builder + /report-builder/:reportid) — report instances from templates: fill data, recompute dataset aggregations from archives, checklist-gated multi-level signing, lock + print. Stored as ReportBuilder_Report DPs.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-report-templates
title: Report Templates
description: Report Templates page (/report-templates) — configurable templates (parameterised sections: text/comment/fields/table/DP-dataset+aggregation/checklist + multi-level signature workflow). Stored as ReportBuilder_Template DPs. Bundles the shared report-builder code it reuses.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-fleet-closures
title: Fleet Closures
description: Fleet Closures page (/fleet-closures) — manage non-working days (year/atelier/machine filters, JSON import-export, overlap replace/ignore/cancel).

name: @visuelconcept/wui-fleet-stop-analysis
title: Fleet Stop-Cause Analysis
description: Fleet Stop-Cause Analysis page (/fleet-stops) — downtime decomposition (dpGetPeriod + interval algorithm), table + echarts tabs.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-thermal-reports
title: Thermal Treatment Reports
description: Thermal Treatment Reports page (/thermal-reports) — per-charge heat-treatment reports, recipe paliers + tolerance band vs actual furnace temp curve (dpGetPeriod), quality/conformity, echarts band chart + print. 1 DP per report.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-fleet-kpi-analysis
title: Fleet KPI Analysis
description: Fleet KPI Analysis page (/fleet-kpi) — availability/TRS per machine over opening time minus closures, echarts; live per-machine TRS computed by the kpiCalc manager.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-production-orders
title: Production Orders
description: Production Orders page (/production-orders) — manage OF stored as a single JSON-list DP (ProductionOrders_List), CRUD + status workflow + echarts Gantt + fleet link; top-page KPIs computed server-side by the productionOrdersKpi manager (ProductionOrders_Kpi DP).

name: @visuelconcept/wui-remote-vnc
title: Remote VNC
description: Remote VNC page (/remote-vnc) — manage VNC connections (1 DP each) and open them in-browser with bundled noVNC over a same-origin /api/vnc/ws WebSocket↔TCP relay to the vncProxy manager (resolves id → host:port from RemoteVnc_ DPs).

name: @visuelconcept/wui-machine-fleet-3d
title: Machine Fleet
description: Machine Fleet 3D hub page (/machine-fleet-3d) — three.js 3D fleet view with per-machine state/KPI bubbles, stop-cause catalog, contextual machine dashboard (Gantt + Pareto), and an AI assistant. Managers: machineSim (fleet simulation), kpiCalc (live KPIs), aiAssistant (the AI assistant, via the /api/ai bridge). The assistant's MCP tools are provided by an OPTIONAL external WinCC OA MCP server (ETM @etm-professional-control/winccoa-mcp-server, ISC) — installed separately, not shipped here. AI provider tokens are read from the AI_Assistant_Config DP — NONE are shipped.

name: @visuelconcept/wui-process-monitor
title: Process Monitor
description: Process Monitor page (/process-monitor) — pmon manager console with one tab per connected server (distributed via per-system ProcessMonitor_Node DPs): status + start/stop/restart + restart-all, plus project ZIP upload/deploy across all servers (optional folder purge, 7-Zip extraction into non-protected folders, config.env, optional restart) with GxP audit-trail tracing (session user). Bridged via /api/process-monitor to the processMonitor MSA manager (per-system agent + aggregator). DPL import handled elsewhere.
